LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT WESTCO EQUITIES, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO FRESNO COUNTY IS GRANTED. (CCP 395(A).) THE COURT FINDS THAT THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO IN FRESNO COUNTY AND THE CONTRACT WAS TO BE PERFORMED IN FRESNO COUNTY. ACCORDINGLY, TRANSFER TO FRESNO COUNTY IS PROPER. (CCP 397(A).) THE EVIDENCE PROFFERED IN REPLY IS IMPROPER AND WAS NOT CONSIDERED BY THE COURT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: ANGIE DINER, CSR # 9581

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MArtin Glickfeld, Esq., 415.441.7491, for plaintiff Richard Castaneda.
Faith Lisle, Esq., 559.256.5000, for defendant Westco Equities, Inc.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK DEFENDANT WESTCO EQUITIES, INCORPORATED'S MOTION For Attorneys' Fees UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WESTCO EQUITIES, INC.'s Motion For Attorneys' Fees is continued to June 11, 2014 to be heard by Judge Goldsmith. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Continued To Jun-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARTIN GLICKFELD, TEL. NO. 441-7491 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TRAVIS STOKES OF THE FISHMAN, LARSEN & ZEITLER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (559) 256-5000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WESTCO EQUITIES, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Change Of Venue to Fresno County is Granted. (CCP 395(a).) The Court finds that the contract was entered into in Fresno County and the contract was to be performed in Fresno County. Accordingly, transfer to Fresno County is proper. (CCP 397(a).) The evidence proffered in reply is improper and was not considered by the Court. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR # 9581 =(302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Continued To Mar-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
